summary: Adjusted the opening entry point so Chapter 3 no longer opens on the same meeting-call scaffold as Chapter 4, and shifted the closing beat to land on Pod 6's new exclusion zone instead of repeating Chapter 2's Marcus-at-the-server-room image.
edits: Reframed the opening around the shared-terminal invite while preserving the same meeting setup and tone.
Reordered the final corridor beat so Marcus remains in place but the chapter closes on the lab routing itself around Pod 6.
